channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: "My posture immediately changed. So did my life." This lapto…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: "My posture immediately changed. So did my life." This laptop stand can free you from the spine-cramming, shoulder-curling, achingly hunched position suffered by so many laptop users. nyti.ms/4b2s0h1
item.content:encoded: "My posture immediately changed. So did my life." This laptop stand can free you from the spine-cramming, shoulder-curling, achingly hunched position suffered by so many laptop users. nyti.ms/4b2s0h1

item.title: 🔊 'It would be like dropping bombs in the middle of Venice …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: 🔊 'It would be like dropping bombs in the middle of Venice or Rome.' Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist Michael Pell discusses the damage to Iran's historic sites on the On Assignment podcast. Tune in now: reut.rs/4phEx5W
item.content:encoded: 🔊 'It would be like dropping bombs in the middle of Venice or Rome.' Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist Michael Pell discusses the damage to Iran's historic sites on the On Assignment podcast. Tune in now: reut.rs/4phEx5W

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al." Leave…
item.author: Jon of The North (@krauza.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.
item.content:encoded:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after U.S. offic…

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [99話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋ クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100話…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[99話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋

クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100話公開記念!!全話無料！>※一挙公開！キャンペーン期間：7/18まで※ <毎週日曜更新！最新3話無料>「実は4股してるの ゴメンね」。中学生時代、人生で初めての彼女にヒドイ振られ方をした秋吉直（あきよし・すなお）。「もう誰かを好きになることなんてない」と思っていたが、大学生となり映画...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[99話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋

クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100話公開記念!!全話無料！>※一挙公開！キャンペーン期間：7/18まで※ <毎週日曜更新！最新3話無料>「実は4股してるの ゴメンね」。中学生時代、人生で初めての彼女にヒドイ振られ方をした秋吉直（あきよし・すなお）。「もう誰かを好きになることなんてない」と思っていたが、大学生となり映画...

item.title: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security thre…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.
item.content:encoded: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

item.title: Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-check…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)
item.description:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.
item.content:encoded:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.

item.title: I hate when something peaks your interest and you want to re…
item.author: VeronicaAG (@veronicatess.bsky.social)
item.description: I hate when something peaks your interest and you want to read the whole article, click on it and they make you create an account as in sign up for their publication before they let you read it 🤨 Nope

item.title: We have news This is Mac He’s hopefully coming to live wit…
item.author: Franglaise (@franglaise.bsky.social)
item.description:
We have news

This is Mac

He’s hopefully coming to live with us at the end of the month

We went to Montpellier to meet him this morning & think he’ll be happy chez nous

He’s 4
Was living on the streets
Has a broken tail
Bit dip & dazzle
Quite chonky & utterly adorable

Hope Calvin approves
item.content:encoded:
We have news

This is Mac

He’s hopefully coming to live with us at the end of the month

We went to Montpellier to meet him this morning & think he’ll be happy chez nous

He’s 4
Was living on the streets
Has a broken tail
Bit dip & dazzle
Quite chonky & utterly adorable

Hope Calvin approves

item.title: Mein Vater: Morgen gucke ich das erste Mal seit Becker das …
item.author: Julia (@nithiel.bsky.social)
item.description:
Mein Vater:

Morgen gucke ich das erste Mal seit Becker das Wimbledon-Finale. Wegen Zverev.

Ich:

(Mutmaßliche) Frauenschläger kriegen von mir keine Unterstützung.

Dem fiel fast die Kinnlade runter. Wie kann es sein, das Menschen davon noch immer nichts wissen?
item.content:encoded:
Mein Vater:

Morgen gucke ich das erste Mal seit Becker das Wimbledon-Finale. Wegen Zverev.

Ich:

(Mutmaßliche) Frauenschläger kriegen von mir keine Unterstützung.

Dem fiel fast die Kinnlade runter. Wie kann es sein, das Menschen davon noch immer nichts wissen?

item.title: At least 10 gun industry businesses, including Glock, Smith …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
At least 10 gun industry businesses, including Glock, Smith & Wesson, Remington and Mossberg, secretly handed over names, addresses and other data to lobbyists, who used the details to rally firearm owners to elect pro-gun politicians.

(Published Oct. 2024)
item.content:encoded:
At least 10 gun industry businesses, including Glock, Smith & Wesson, Remington and Mossberg, secretly handed over names, addresses and other data to lobbyists, who used the details to rally firearm owners to elect pro-gun politicians.

(Published Oct. 2024)

item.title: Heather Today, Scottish Borders, Scotland!💙🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿
item.author: Mabel Logan (@mabellogan.bsky.social)
item.description: Heather Today, Scottish Borders, Scotland!💙🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿
item.content:encoded: Heather Today, Scottish Borders, Scotland!💙🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿
